## What happened

A short description of the bug. One or two sentences is fine.

## What you expected to happen

What you thought the mod would do instead.

## How to reproduce it

Step by step, starting from a save or from the main menu. Be specific about
which keys you pressed and in what order. If the bug only happens in one area
or after one specific action, say so.

1.
2.
3.

## Log bundle

Please attach a log zip. To make one:

1. Run `KotorAccessibilityInstaller.exe` again on the same machine.
2. When asked, choose "Collect logs for beta test".
3. The installer writes a zip to your Downloads folder and opens Explorer
   on it. Drag that zip into this issue.

The bundle contains the patch log, any crash dump from Windows Error
Reporting, the installer log, and a small system-info summary. No personal
data is collected.

## Game and install info

- KOTOR version (Steam or GoG, plus the version number if you know it):
- Game language (the language KOTOR itself is set to):
- Installer version (shown on the first installer screen):
- Mod version (shown in the patch log, or in Add / Remove Programs):
- Optional mods you enabled at install time (K1CP, cut content, companion balance, etc.):
- Spatial audio enabled (yes / no):

## If the installer rejected your game version

If the installer told you the game version is not supported, paste the SHA-256
hash it displayed here. We will add your variant if its bytes match a build
we already know about.

Hash:

## Anything else

Anything you noticed that might matter — a recent Windows update, a recent
driver change, a save imported from another machine, etc.
